spec.title: Repository Retention and Size
spec.description: Shows repository-level retention and storage characteristics for each repository and host. Use this panel to verify how much history is being kept, how long the retained window is, and how large each repository has grown.

spec.title: Restore Points by Date
spec.description: Shows which backup dates are still present in the repository after pruning. Use this panel in combination with the dashboard filter options to verify per-repository retention patterns, spot gaps, and confirm that expected daily, weekly, or monthly backups are being preserved.

spec.title: Backup Age by Target (Daily)
spec.description: Displays the time since the latest daily backup for each repository and backup host. Use this panel to quickly spot overdue or missing daily backups.

spec.title: Backup Age by Target (Weekly)
spec.description: Displays the time since the latest weekly backup for each repository and backup host. Use this panel to quickly spot overdue or missing weekly backups.

spec.title: Backup Failures
spec.description: Counts create, prune, and compact stages whose most recent run failed within the selected host and repository scope. A value of 0 means all last runs succeeded.

spec.title: Backup Health Status
spec.description: Summarizes backup health for each repository and backup host. Create, prune, and compact reflect the latest stage result, while freshness evaluates whether the current backup age is still acceptable for the configured frequency.

spec.title: Backup Stage Durations
spec.description: Shows how long the create, prune, and compact stages take for each repository on each backup host. Use this panel to spot slow repositories, host-specific outliers, and which stage is dominating runtime.

spec.title: Last Backup Details
spec.description: Shows the latest recorded backup state per repository and host. Includes archive metadata from the most recent create run together with derived storage efficiency and reclamation metrics for operational analysis.
